channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish fly tipped again, 18th July
item.description:
Same issue again and again. Same residents who live in flats above dumping their rubbish on the streets and making area looking a dump.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 418, Upper Elmers End Road, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of broken furniture and boards., 18th July
item.description:
Broken furniture and boards have been dumped on the pavement and amongst wheelie bins that are blocking a fire exit to Superdrug. There is also a council notice board with old notices in it. I havn't been there for 3 weeks and it wasn't like that last time I was there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Cross Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All drains on Long Walk blocked, 18th July
item.description:
Clearly haven't been cleared in a while, water flows down the hill and takes rubbish/dirt with it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westdale Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial fly-tipping in Eglinton Road Car Park, 18th July
item.description:
Large amounts of dumped furniture waste. Blocking spaces and making access difficult.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped mattresses, 18th July
item.description:
Fly-tipped mattresses on potentially private land, should be envirocrime.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Telephone relay point box open, 18th July
item.description:
The telephone exchange box is open, this open to abuse. Needs to be shut and locked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141, Highbury New Park, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet again rubbish dumped in front of DRFO restaurant, 18th July
item.description:
As soon as the previous pile of rubbish was cleared yesterday, even more rubbish was dumped overnight. This is now happening every single day and it has to stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip back of 4 Velde Way facing Thornecombe Road, 18th July
item.description:
Various items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Velde Way, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement Thornecombe Road junction with East Dulwich Grove, 18th July
item.description:
Blocked pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Thorncombe Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping side of 1 Nimegen Way, 18th July
item.description:
Various items regularly fly tipped by residents of Nimegen Way SE22 8TL on the grassy area to the side of 1 Nimegen Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Nimegen Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Donaldson Road between Edmond and Hartland, 18th July
item.description:
The whole street is absolutely filthy after the street party on Lonsdale Road. Drinks cans everywhere, litter, bags - on pavement and in the gutter
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned office chair needs removal, 18th July
item.description:
Gore Road. Near St Agnes Gate entrance to Victoria Park. Next to bike parking. Abandoned office chair needs removal

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gore Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 18th July
item.description:
Graffiti on bike locker

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich

item.title: Graffiti, 18th July
item.description:
Stickers on coastguard sign

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cutty Sark Gardens, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish outside electric unit, 18th July
item.description:
Dumped rubbish in bin bags outside electric unit Found bags before in our front gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Edmunds Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Iron Weighing scales and raw salmon dumped on street, 18th July
item.description:
An old fashioned iron scales and raw salmon food waste, now covered in flies and maggots, has been dumped on the pavement and grass on Pellerin Road near the Shellgrove estate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 18th July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cutty Sark Gardens, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th July
item.description:
Fly tipping by 105 Pelton Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Huntley Close, Greenwich

item.title: Graffiti, 18th July
item.description:
Graffiti on bike locker

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pelton Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on footway. Hazard to pedestrians and animals. The broken glass is at the edge of the pavement on the corner between the Candy box side of Maple Crescent and Blackfen Road. . It is directly under the road sign indicating Blackfen road is two way., 18th July
item.description:
This glass has been there for days and has already been reported. An email was received stating this matter had been resolved. It has not the glass will cause someone a nasty injury soon and the council will find themselves being sued.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 286, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
